current_run.problem_name: Hidden Quadratic Pair Product Sum Parity
current_run.description: Given an N-bit input x, an oracle computes a boolean function f(x). The function is defined by a secret pair of distinct indices (idx_a, idx_b) where 0 <= idx_a < idx_b < N. The oracle returns the parity of the product of bits at idx_a and idx_b XORed with the sum of all other bits. That is, f(x) = ((x_idx_a AND x_idx_b) XOR (SUM_{k not in {idx_a, idx_b}} x_k)) MOD 2. The goal is to find the secret pair (idx_a, idx_b). This problem requires N >= 2 for a non-empty secret space.
